dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Henry. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Henry! How can I help you today?
I work as a security analyst. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A security analyst — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy surfing, diving. I also like reading about mobile apps.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
By the way, I'm also interested in Flutter.
